title: Choosing the Right AI Provider for Your Email Campaigns
author: David Williams
excerpt: A practical guide to selecting AI providers for your email marketing needs and how Laravel Mail leverages Neuron's multi-provider support.
content:
When building AI-powered email marketing, choosing the right AI provider is crucial. Neuron's support for multiple providers gives Laravel Mail the flexibility to select the best model for each task. Let's explore how we approach provider selection and why it matters for your campaigns.

Neuron supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, Gemini, Mistral, and more—giving you the freedom to choose the right tool for each job.

Understanding Provider Options

Each AI provider has strengths and weaknesses. Some excel at creative writing, others at analysis. Some are fast and affordable, others more expensive but more capable. Understanding these differences helps you make informed choices.

Provider Comparison

OpenAI

Excellent for creative content and general tasks. Widely supported and well-documented.

Anthropic

Strong at reasoning and analysis. Great for complex decision-making tasks.

Ollama

Run AI models locally. Perfect for privacy-sensitive applications.

Gemini

Google's offering with strong multimodal capabilities.

How We Use Multiple Providers

At Laravel Mail, we don't rely on a single provider. Instead, we route different tasks to the provider best suited for them. Creative tasks might use one provider, while analytical tasks use another. This approach optimizes for both quality and cost.

Neuron's unified interface makes switching providers seamless. When a new model or provider becomes available, we can integrate it without rewriting our core functionality.

The provider-agnostic architecture means you're never locked into a single vendor. This flexibility protects your investment and ensures the best results.

Benefits for Your Campaigns

With multi-provider support, your campaigns benefit from the best AI capabilities available. We handle the complexity of provider selection so you can focus on results.

Leverage the best AI providers at Laravel Mail.
